title: The Leonardo Collection Lodden Large Tray William Morris For Kitchen & Home | Non Slip Serving Tray For Food | Serving Platter For Lunch & Dinner | Plastic Trays For Tea & Serving Dishes
features: Durable Serving Tray for Everyday Use: High-quality plastic tray designed for serving dishes, snacks, and meals. Ideal for kitchen tray use, offering reliable support for lunch, dinner, or casual snacks with style and convenience.

Non Slip Trays for Safe Serving: Reliable non slip trays for eating with a textured surface to prevent spills and slips. Perfect for use as dinner trays, snack tray, or tea tray, ensuring stability during serving and dining.

Versatile Serving Platters for Parties: Stylish serving platters for parties suitable for catering, party food trays, and everyday use. Excellent serving tray for displaying and presenting appetizers, desserts, or drinks with elegance.

Multipurpose Trays for Home & Catering: Perfect serving trays for various occasions, including parties, tea service, or everyday dining. Practical food trays that enhance serving experiences with durability and a modern aesthetic.

Compact & Practical Design: Measuring 45 Cm x 32.4 Cm x 4.8 , these small trays are ideal for versatile serving needs. Excellent party platters for food, ensuring easy handling and convenient use in kitchens, dining rooms, or events.

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Hand wash only. Avoid harsh chemicals. Do not microwave.
